query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as overpriced_count FROM products WHERE price > 10000;
SELECT MIN(price/100.0) as min_price, MAX(price/100.0) as max_price, AVG(price/100.0) as avg_price FROM products WHERE status = 'active';
